field.name: slug
field.help: Auto-generated from the product name. Customize to fix the storefront URL.

group.string: Storefront Copy (English only — shown to customers)

field.name: tagline
field.placeholder: e.g. Handcrafted in 14K gold with a timeless silhouette
field.help: One-line value proposition shown on product cards (max ~100 chars)

field.name: storefront_short_description
field.placeholder: 1–3 sentences. Persuasive, concise, customer-safe. No internal notes.
field.help: Shown on product cards and listing previews

field.name: storefront_long_description
field.placeholder: Full product story for the detail page. Focus on craftsmanship and value.
field.help: Displayed in the 'About This Piece' section on the detail page

field.name: product_details
field.placeholder: Metal: 14K Yellow Gold Stone: 0.25ct Round Diamond Length: 18 inches Clasp: Lobster claw
field.help: Key specifications shown in the 'Product Details' section

field.name: care_and_shipping
field.placeholder: Store in the provided jewelry box away from moisture. Complimentary gift packaging included. Free US shipping on orders over $200.
field.help: Shown in the 'Shipping & Care' section on the detail page
